commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Do not queue an automated repair; the next blocker is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on landing this as a chat-specific complement to the broader Feishu routing work.; Cleared: No concrete new secret-handling, dependency, or supply-chain flaw was found; the security-sensitive credential-selection change is captured as merge risk. (sha=fac080e4820e36bc9a4d6c400fd8efd997ae6981)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `feishu_chat` to register through an execution-time tool factory, use the shared Feishu tool-account resolver, and add chat routing regression tests.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +97. Total +103 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current `registerFeishuChatTools` binds `feishu_chat` to `accounts[0]` during registration, so a tool built in a context with `agentAccountId` cannot change the client account. I did not run a live Feishu tenant repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Do not queue an automated repair; the next blocker is contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on landing this as a chat-specific complement to the broader Feishu routing work.
